originContent: # Music Assistant Jukebox Integration (Deprecated)
translatedContent: # Music Assistant Jukebox Integration (Deprecated)

originContent: ## Notice: this integration is not longer activly being maintained.
translatedContent: ## Notice: this integration is no longer actively being maintained.

originContent: Music Assistant now has a Plugin that should be used instead and offers much of the same features.
translatedContent: Music Assistant now has a Plugin that should be used instead and offers much of the same features.

originContent: See https://beta.music-assistant.io/plugins/party-mode/
translatedContent: See https://beta.music-assistant.io/plugins/party-mode/

originContent: A Home Assistant integration that provides a web-based song request system that integrates with Music Assistant to create an interactive jukebox experience for guests!
translatedContent: A Home Assistant integration that provides a web-based song request system that integrates with Music Assistant to create an interactive jukebox experience for guests!

originContent: ![Jukebox Interface](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox/main/showcase.avifs)
translatedContent: ![Jukebox Interface](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox/main/showcase.avifs)

originContent: ## Features
translatedContent: ## Features

originContent: - Real-time song search across all connected Music Assistant providers
translatedContent: - Real-time song search across all connected Music Assistant providers

originContent: - Minimalist responsive design with album artwork display
translatedContent: - Minimalist responsive design with album artwork display

originContent: - Check whats Now Playing and Up Next in real time.
translatedContent: - Check what's Now Playing and Up Next in real time.

originContent: - No login required for guests, just share the URL
translatedContent: - No login required for guests, just share the URL

originContent: - Queue management through Home Assistant entities
translatedContent: - Queue management through Home Assistant entities

originContent: - Auto queues a default party playlist when the request queue is empty
translatedContent: - Auto queues a default party playlist when the request queue is empty

originContent: - Control queuing frequency (limit queue spamming)
translatedContent: - Control queuing frequency (limit queue spamming)

originContent: - Access control through Home Assistant
translatedContent: - Access control through Home Assistant

originContent: - Auto revoking/creating access tokens for security
translatedContent: - Auto revoking/creating access tokens for security

originContent: Head on over to [Discussions / FeatureRequests](https://github.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox/discussions) if you want to request new features and general discussion!
translatedContent: Head on over to [Discussions / FeatureRequests](https://github.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox/discussions) if you want to request new features and general discussion!

originContent: ## Prerequisites
translatedContent: ## Prerequisites

originContent: Before installing this integration, make sure you have:
translatedContent: Before installing this integration, make sure you have:

originContent: - Home Assistant instance with [Music Assistant](https://github.com/music-assistant/hass-music-assistant) integration
translatedContent: - Home Assistant instance with [Music Assistant](https://github.com/music-assistant/hass-music-assistant) integration

originContent: - Music Assistant Server Addon in Home Assistant (Seperately hosted HA/MA instances may not work)
translatedContent: - Music Assistant Server Addon in Home Assistant (Separately hosted HA/MA instances may not work)

originContent: - A supported music provider configured in Music Assistant (e.g. Spotify, Apple Music, etc.)
translatedContent: - A supported music provider configured in Music Assistant (e.g. Spotify, Apple Music, etc.)

originContent: - Media player entity configured in Home Assistant
translatedContent: - Media player entity configured in Home Assistant

originContent: ## Installation
translatedContent: ## Installation

originContent: ### HACS (Recommended)
translatedContent: ### HACS (Recommended)

originContent: [![Open your Home Assistant instance and open a repository inside the Home Assistant Community Store.](https://my.home-assistant.io/badges/hacs_repository.svg)](https://my.home-assistant.io/redirect/hacs_repository/?owner=DJS91&repository=HAMusicAssistantJukebox&category=Integration)
translatedContent: [![Open your Home Assistant instance and open a repository inside the Home Assistant Community Store.](https://my.home-assistant.io/badges/hacs_repository.svg)](https://my.home-assistant.io/redirect/hacs_repository/?owner=DJS91&repository=HAMusicAssistantJukebox&category=Integration)

originContent: or
translatedContent: or

originContent: 1. Add this repository to HACS as a custom repository
translatedContent: 1. Add this repository to HACS as a custom repository

originContent: - HACS > Menu > Custom repositories
translatedContent: - HACS > Menu > Custom repositories

originContent: - URL: `https://github.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox`
translatedContent: - URL: `https://github.com/DJS91/HAMusicAssistantJukebox`

originContent: - Category: Integration
translatedContent: - Category: Integration

originContent: 2. Click Install
translatedContent: 2. Click Install

originContent: 3. Restart Home Assistant
translatedContent: 3. Restart Home Assistant

originContent: ### Manual Installation
translatedContent: ### Manual Installation

originContent: 1. Download the latest release
translatedContent: 1. Download the latest release

originContent: 2. Copy the `custom_components/music_assistant_jukebox` folder to your Home Assistant `custom_components` folder
translatedContent: 2. Copy the `custom_components/music_assistant_jukebox` folder to your Home Assistant `custom_components` folder

originContent: 3. Restart Home Assistant
translatedContent: 3. Restart Home Assistant

originContent: ## Configuration
translatedContent: ## Configuration

originContent: 1. Go to Settings > Devices & Services
translatedContent: 1. Go to Settings > Devices & Services

originContent: 2. Click "Add Integration"
translatedContent: 2. Click "Add Integration"

originContent: 3. Search for "Music Assistant Jukebox"
translatedContent: 3. Search for "Music Assistant Jukebox"

originContent: 4. Select your Music Assistant instance and media player entity
translatedContent: 4. Select your Music Assistant instance and media player entity

originContent: 5. Go to Settings > Automations & Scenes > + Create Automation
translatedContent: 5. Go to Settings > Automations & Scenes > + Create Automation

originContent: 6. Select "Music Assistant Jukebox Controller" from the list.
translatedContent: 6. Select "Music Assistant Jukebox Controller" from the list.

originContent: 7. Enter the same media player entity from Step 4 and enter the name of your default playlist from music assistant and click Save.
translatedContent: 7. Enter the same media player entity from Step 4 and enter the name of your default playlist from music assistant and click Save.

originContent: ## Usage
translatedContent: ## Usage

originContent: Switch on the jukebox using "JukeBox: Allow access" switch.
translatedContent: Switch on the jukebox using "JukeBox: Allow access" switch.

originContent: Access the jukebox via the new "Music Assistant Jukebox" Sidebar Panel OR
translatedContent: Access the jukebox via the new "Music Assistant Jukebox" Sidebar Panel OR

originContent: Scan the QR Code entity of choice OR
translatedContent: Scan the QR Code entity of choice OR

originContent: Access the jukebox interface directly at:
translatedContent: Access the jukebox interface directly at:

originContent: http://homeassistant:8123/local/jukebox/jukebox.html
translatedContent: http://homeassistant:8123/local/jukebox/jukebox.html

originContent: ## Entities
translatedContent: ## Entities

originContent: The integration adds these entities to Home Assistant:
translatedContent: The integration adds these entities to Home Assistant:

originContent: ### Switches
translatedContent: ### Switches

originContent: - `switch.jukebox_queue`: Enable/disable queuing of songs (No manual control required. Managed by automation.)
translatedContent: - `switch.jukebox_queue`: Enable/disable queuing of songs (No manual control required. Managed by automation.)

originContent: - `switch.jukebox_allow_access`: Enable/disable access to the jukebox interface
translatedContent: - `switch.jukebox_allow_access`: Enable/disable access to the jukebox interface

originContent: - `switch.music_assistant_jukebox_jukebox_play_music_on_start`: Turn on/off if the default playlist plays automatically when the jukbox is turned on.
translatedContent: - `switch.music_assistant_jukebox_jukebox_play_music_on_start`: Turn on/off if the default playlist plays automatically when the jukbox is turned on.

originContent: ### Number
translatedContent: ### Number

originContent: - `number.jukebox_queue_length`: Shows current queue length (No manual adjustment required, Managed by automation)
translatedContent: - `number.jukebox_queue_length`: Shows current queue length (No manual adjustment required, Managed by automation)

originContent: - `number.music_assistant_jukebox_jukebox_queuing_delay`: Set a delay between song requests for guests (seconds) (0 = off)
translatedContent: - `number.music_assistant_jukebox_jukebox_queuing_delay`: Set a delay between song requests for guests (seconds) (0 = off)

originContent: ### Sensor
translatedContent: ### Sensor

originContent: - `music_assistant_jukebox_external_qr_code`: External Jukebox UI Access QR code image for easy sharing on dashboards for users not on your network
translatedContent: - `music_assistant_jukebox_external_qr_code`: External Jukebox UI Access QR code image for easy sharing on dashboards for users not on your network

originContent: - `music_assistant_jukebox_internal_qr_code`: Internal Jukebox UI Access QR code image for easy sharing for users on your network
translatedContent: - `music_assistant_jukebox_internal_qr_code`: Internal Jukebox UI Access QR code image for easy sharing for users on your network

originContent: ## Automation Blueprint
translatedContent: ## Automation Blueprint

originContent: The integration includes an automation blueprint that handles:
translatedContent: The integration includes an automation blueprint that handles:

originContent: - Queue length tracking
translatedContent: - Queue length tracking

originContent: - Default playlist fallback
translatedContent: - Default playlist fallback

originContent: - Access control
translatedContent: - Access control

originContent: - Media player control
translatedContent: - Media player control

originContent: To use the blueprint:
translatedContent: To use the blueprint:

originContent: 1. Go to Settings > Automations & Scenes
translatedContent: 1. Go to Settings > Automations & Scenes

originContent: 2. Click "+ Create Automation"
translatedContent: 2. Click "+ Create Automation"

originContent: 3. Select "Music Assistant Jukebox Controller"
translatedContent: 3. Select "Music Assistant Jukebox Controller"

originContent: 4. Configure:
translatedContent: 4. Configure:

originContent: - Media Player: Select your Music Assistant media player
translatedContent: - Media Player: Select your Music Assistant media player

originContent: - Default Playlist: Enter the name of your fallback playlist
translatedContent: - Default Playlist: Enter the name of your fallback playlist

translatedContent: ## Credits
